textByHash.00e081ef36a8a88af3933173fc3724bb39bf348f: You will look lovely in that outfit.
textByHash.2e1da0453d10ef946a8dc48021f5dc69c48dbc3a: Oh, hello again. Want some ore?
textByHash.734b6a52378fdcd272f36bf7af9344276eaddf4e: No, this hair is just an extension of my head hair, which is currently not being taxed.
textByHash.995e661cb6a192f2680570ea961775654bad8284: But I don't have a beard!
textByHash.9eacb6de27eb72bfde268ec4517881ebb4fe4fe0: Groan! Your lame attempts at humour do not save me money. Come on, break it to me gently, what is it this time?
textByHash.a6d569907e15fe59dbb88219d9b1208b91426f22: You should speak with the ruler of this isle, King Gjuki Sorvott IV.
textByHash.aa5bce8d27877a02c4cf9d58799f28f86f00fd14: You look lovely in that outfit.
textByHash.d07a1825c36b304d79a71ebc52c1efcbdd4e50d2: Awww come on, be a gent.
textByHash.dd241fadb13f9f3ccf23fb54523268ea556e18a5: Is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.ff129399769a316f65ae92cfd735fff42e87ec3d: No more! Haven't we all suffered enough?
